meaning: vi.说孩子气的话,说半截话,闲聊,胡说,唠叨vt.天真地说n.孩子话,无聊话,胡说,废话
examples: Just be sure not to prattle on.
Without money, your plan will be a prattle-prattle.
But today both Bush and Olmert will reject these options in favor of mindless peace process prattle.
Rather than prattle on about the coming apocalypse, they could work to replace treeless, dense slums with shaded low-lying clean houses that are easier to heat or cool.
